filterflow_status.status:
## bayesfilter-py311-compat
 M scripts/base.py
 M scripts/simple_linear_common.py
 M scripts/simple_linear_smoothness.py

non_implications: No claim that the float64 variant is pristine upstream filterflow.
question: Does an experimental in-memory float64 filterflow variant preserve the Section-5.1-style LGSSM table scale?

reference_policy.use_decision: Float64 may be used as a debugging reference only if this probe passes; canonical reproduction records still retain float32.

settings.comparison_policy: Kalman per-time deltas must be below tolerance; PF and RegularisedTransform rows must remain within one canonical float32 Monte Carlo standard deviation.
